_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Node.js - Generic Bot
author: admin@xwolf.space
description: Generic Node.js egg. Installs dependencies on every startup then runs the bot.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash

apt-get update -y
apt-get install -y git curl python3 make g++ ffmpeg

cd /mnt/server

if [ -z "${GIT_REPO}" ]; then
  echo "No GIT_REPO set. Skipping clone. Upload files manually."
else
  if [ -z "$(ls -A /mnt/server)" ]; then
    git clone ${GIT_REPO} .
    echo "Cloned ${GIT_REPO} successfully."
  else
    echo "Files already present, skipping clone."
  fi
fi

if [ -f package.json ]; then
  echo "Installing all dependencies..."
  npm install
  npm install adm-zip better-sqlite3 axios node-fetch 2>/dev/null || true
  echo "All dependencies installed."
fi

echo "Installation complete. Start the server to run."

variables.name: Git Repo URL
variables.description: GitHub repo to clone on install. Example: https://github.com/user/repo

variables.name: Bot JS File
variables.description: The main JS file to start the bot

variables.name: Max RAM MB
variables.description: Max memory for Node.js in MB
